news.headline: UK intercepts Russian shadow fleet vessel in Channel: ministry
news.summary: British forces on Sunday intercepted a sanctioned oil tanker belonging to Russia's shadow fleet in the English Channel, the defence ministry said, in a six-hour operation hailed by Kyiv.

news.headline: Trump vows Mideast deal is on, calls for no more attacks
news.summary: US President Donald Trump on Sunday said Israeli strikes on Beirut "should not have happened" as he vowed a regional peace deal was at hand, though he did not confirm his earlier claim it would be signed during the day. France 24's Noga Tarnopolsky tells us more.

news.headline: Donald Trump turns 80 and celebrates with UFC cage fighting on the White House lawn
news.summary: President Donald Trump turned 80 on Sunday and was set to celebrate with one of the more surreal spectacles in both sports and the nation's capital: cage fighting on the White House lawn. We discuss it with our international affairs commentator Douglas Herbert.

news.headline: Israeli strikes on Beirut foil US peace plans, Iran says ‘no point’ in talks
news.summary: US President Donald Trump on Sunday urged no further attacks by anyone after Israel’s military said it launched strikes on Hezbollah targets in Beirut, potentially complicating efforts to finalise a deal to end the US-Iran war.
